stepAnswer: The interval for laptops priced at $700, because $700 is further from the mean of $1,000. The further the $$x$$ value is from the mean $$x$$ value, the wider our interval is.
stepTitle: C1) Which one of these two intervals do we expect to be wider? Why?
stepBody: Assume the average price of a laptop in Milena’s dataset is $1,000. Milena generates 90% confidence intervals for the predicted battery life of laptops priced at $1,100 and $700.
answerLatex: The interval for laptops priced at $700, because $700 is further from the mean of $1,000. The further the $$x$$ value is from the mean $$x$$ value, the wider our interval is.
choices: The interval for laptops priced at $700, because $700 is further from the mean of $1,000. The further the $$x$$ value is from the mean $$x$$ value, the wider our interval is.
The interval for laptops priced at $1,100, because $1,100 is closer to the mean of $1,000. The closer the $$x$$ value is to the mean $$x$$ value, the wider our interval is.
